audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone with a moderate pace, accompanied by a consistent background hum.
temporal_description: A man wearing headphones is seated in front of a laptop, his gaze fixed on the screen. The scene shifts to another man in a dark suit, standing in a dimly lit room with computer monitors displaying blue data. A third person, wearing a light-colored shirt, walks past him while holding a water bottle. The man in the suit turns his head slightly as the person passes, then looks down. The first man remains still, focused on his screen throughout.
